news.title: It now costs $160 to fill up America’s top-selling vehicle as the Iran war nears its 10th week
news.title_cn: 隨著伊朗戰爭接近第十週，美國最暢銷的汽車加滿油現在需要 160 美元
news.summary: Regular unleaded gas is up almost 50% since the start of the Iran war, to $4.42 a gallon late Friday morning, according to GasBuddy.

news.summary: Trump said there "is tremendous discord" among Iran's leaders, which has complicated efforts to end the war that the United States began in late February.
